initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT c_customer_sk, d_year
FROM (
    SELECT c_customer_sk, d_year, COUNT(DISTINCT channel) AS channel_count
    FROM (
        SELECT c_customer_sk, d_year, 'store' AS channel
        FROM store_sales
        JOIN customer ON ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
        JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk

        UNION ALL

        SELECT c_customer_sk, d_year, 'web' AS channel
        FROM web_sales
        JOIN customer ON ws_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
        JOIN date_dim ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk

        UNION ALL

        SELECT c_customer_sk, d_year, 'catalog' AS channel
        FROM catalog_sales
        JOIN customer ON cs_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
        JOIN date_dim ON cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    ) AS all_channels
    GROUP BY c_customer_sk, d_year
) AS channel_counts
WHERE channel_count = 3
LIMIT 100

SELECT c_customer_sk, d_year
FROM (
    SELECT c_customer_sk, d_year
    FROM store_sales, customer, date_dim
    WHERE ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
      AND ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    GROUP BY c_customer_sk, d_year

    INTERSECT

    SELECT c_customer_sk, d_year
    FROM web_sales, customer, date_dim
    WHERE ws_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
      AND ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    GROUP BY c_customer_sk, d_year

    INTERSECT

    SELECT c_customer_sk, d_year
    FROM catalog_sales, customer, date_dim
    WHERE cs_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
      AND cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    GROUP BY c_customer_sk, d_year
) t
GROUP BY c_customer_sk, d_year
ORDER BY c_customer_sk, d_year
LIMIT 100

initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT c_customer_sk, d_year
FROM (
    SELECT c_customer_sk, d_year
    FROM store_sales, customer, date_dim
    WHERE ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
      AND ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
      AND hd_dep_count = 4
    GROUP BY c_customer_sk, d_year
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT 'store') >= 1

    INTERSECT

    SELECT c_customer_sk, d_year
    FROM web_sales, customer, date_dim
    WHERE ws_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
      AND ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
      AND hd_dep_count = 4
    GROUP BY c_customer_sk, d_year
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT 'web') >= 1

    INTERSECT

    SELECT c_customer_sk, d_year
    FROM catalog_sales, customer, date_dim
    WHERE cs_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
      AND cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
      AND hd_dep_count = 4
    GROUP BY c_customer_sk, d_year
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT 'catalog') >= 1
) AS t
GROUP BY c_customer_sk, d_year
ORDER BY c_customer_sk, d_year
LIMIT 100
